case_title: 954 GEARY LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. DANIEL FINN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 954 GEARY LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FINN, DANIEL , AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 954 GEARY STREET, UNIT NUMBER 23 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
